title: Empty Rooms
description: Father is gone. His study holds secrets you've never seen before.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Addie made you change for the day because, as she says, NO ONE should have to face a crises in bedroom slippers. Fortified with tea and a scone, you return to your father's ruined study.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: This isn't right. The professor would never leave the room like this.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Look at all these ripped up papers! Someone was looking for something.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: I see a piece of paper with my name on it.

opening.speaker: Rainie
opening.text: Here's another one! it looks like a note!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You search carefully. More torn pieces lie scattered across the floor.

midpoint.speaker: Rainie
midpoint.text: What do you think the note meant?

midpoint.speaker: Veracity
midpoint.text: Da was trying to warn me. He showed me a secret panel once... let's see if it's still there...

midpoint.speaker: Narrator
midpoint.text: You walk over to the front panel on your father's desk. What was the secret combination again? If only you could remember it...

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: You pull out what looks like a well-worn journal and a small cedar box with the symbol of a moth on it.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: I guess we read the journal.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: You carefully open the worn leather journal. There are pages of diagrams, calculations, and notes. But tucked inside, a folded letter addressed to you.

closing.speaker: Addie
closing.text: Wait, Vera. There's another note here.

closing.speaker: Narrator
closing.text: Addie unfolds it carefully. The handwriting is your father's.

closing.speaker: Veracity
closing.text: Addie, we have to find him.

closing.speaker: Addie
closing.text: It's dangerous out there, for clockwork animals like Rainie and myself. To say nothing of the quality of tea one finds while traveling... But yes. We can't leave him alone out there.

closing.speaker: Rainie
closing.text: Adventure! We'll find him, Vera. Don't worry!

puzzle.title: Piece Together the Note
puzzle.instructions: Arrange the torn pieces to read the full message.

deskPuzzle.title: The Secret Panel
deskPuzzle.instructions: Follow Da's secret sequence to open the hidden compartment.
